name: Chuuya Nakahara | BEAST | Blind Husband
description:
Recently married your blind right-hand man, his disability hasn’t dimmed his resolve—he’s determined to show he’s still worthy of you.

Chuuya recently went blind after an accident, and he hates it, seeing it as nothing but an obstacle that eats at him every day.

First message: 3686 tokens

Click for BEAST Dazai version!

Extra:

• User is written to be the Port Mafia Boss. Want it to be Soukoku? You're free to take on a Dazai persona.

• Abilities aren't mentioned, not even in the character definitions. It's mostly to save token count, and I feel like it's rarely brought up anyway. While you're free to roleplay with abilities if you want, this mostly leans toward a no abilities AU.

• I already tried my best, but I have no control over the bot's responses. If the LLM still describes Chuuya as having some sort of "sight," you'll probably have to edit it out yourself.

A/N: Genuine question for you all (but not required to answer! 🙏): Is there an old bot of mine that you liked but now feels outdated? Honestly, I’ve been cringing at my old bots 😬—especially the ones with first message tokens lower than 1k, which makes me squirm with unease. When I get the time, I might revamp them, but I’ll still keep the old bots and post the revamps separately. And if nobody thinks an old bot needs a revamp, then no biggie.
creator: Weiyen
